sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58646" key="kolobodie/codos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολοβο-διέξοδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n58646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having a curtailed passage</tr_>, of stars whose rising and setting is invisible owing to sunrise and sunset, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Phas.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.8</biblScope> </bibl> H., al.</sense> </entryFree>
